justification: The diff correctly updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21 and performs a complete Jakarta EE namespace migration (javax -> jakarta) across all servlets, filters, and web.xml, including schema updates. No spurious churn is present, and all deprecated javax patterns are cleared. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., pattern matching, records, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is capped at 4.
